Title
Okita in Charge

Story
You had a great idea. Since it was finally October and you’d come across Kinktober online, you decided to ask your Servant, Okita Souji, if she'd be willing to try out a few kinks with you. Naturally, she was a bit confused as to why this moment had to be so kinky, but as your Servant, she couldn’t exactly refuse. So, after some thought, Okita mentioned that she’d like to try pegging if she was going to be asked. You agreed without hesitation.
